title: Vocabulary Browser
description: The Vocabulary Browser lets you search the full OMOP vocabulary across all domains — conditions, drugs, procedures, measurements, observations, and more. You can explore concept hierarchies, relationships, and mappings directly in Parthenon.
tips: Use the Domain filter to narrow results to the clinical domain you care about.
Standard concepts (standard_concept = 'S') are what appear in CDM clinical tables.
Non-standard concepts can be browsed as source codes but won't appear in cohort queries directly.
The Hierarchy tab shows ancestors and descendants — useful for understanding how broad a concept is.
Semantic search (AI-powered) can find concepts by clinical description when exact name matching fails.
Search is powered by Apache Solr when available — faceted counts update instantly as you type. If Solr is unavailable, search falls back to PostgreSQL.
Use the autocomplete (Solr suggest) for fast type-ahead concept lookup when adding concepts to concept sets or cohort definitions.
